channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: No lawsuits required: U.S. Customs is working on a system to refund tariffs
item.description: U.S. Customs told the trade court it aims for a streamlined process in 45 days to return importers' money without requiring individual lawsuits.

item.title: Your Winter Paralympics primer: What, who and how to watch
item.description: Hundreds of para athletes are competing in Italy through March 15. Many Americans are defending past titles, with the U.S. sled hockey team hoping to ...

item.title: Middle East conflicts largely avoided energy facilities in the past. Not in this war
item.description: Recent conflicts in the region have either spared energy infrastructure or caused limited damage. That isn't the case in the U.S.-Israeli war with Ira...

item.title: Oil surges to its highest price since 2023, and stocks drop after U.S. jobs report
item.description: Stocks fell Friday on worries that the economy could become stuck in a worst-case scenario of stagnating growth and high inflation. Oil prices touched...

item.title: Poll: A majority of Americans opposes U.S. military action in Iran
item.description: Most Americans disapprove of President Trump's handling of Iran, and a majority sees Iran as either only a minor threat or no threat at all, an NPR/ P...

item.title: Evidence suggests the deadly blast at an Iranian school was likely a US airstrike
The 10 States With the Lowest (and Highest) Property Tax Rates in America
item.description: As if house prices and insurance weren’t expensive enough, throw soaring property taxes in the mix, and you have the holy trinity of unaffordability, ...

item.title: For US Muslims, immigration crackdown fears, new war worries and anti-Muslim rhetoric cloud Ramadan
Falling Mortgage Rates Could Make It Harder to Find Cash Flowing Properties—But Here’s How Investors Can Find Them Anyway
item.description: Mortgage rates have hit their lowest levels in three years, and while that should be a cause for celebration from prospective homebuyers, it hasn’t tr...

item.title: Microsoft, Google, Amazon say Anthropic Claude remains available to non-defense customers
item.description: Trump's Department of War feud with Anthropic won't impact other companies that are using Claude via Microsoft and Google products.

item.title: Attempted suicides, fights, pain: 911 calls reveal misery at ICE’s largest detention facility
item.description: The calls to 911 poured in from staff at Camp East Montana, the nation’s largest U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement detention facility, in its f...

item.title: 10 Things We Wish We Knew Before Buying a Rental Property
item.description: If you know these 10 things before you start investing in real estate, you’ll reach financial freedom faster, make more money with fewer rentals, and ...

item.title: Anthropic’s Pentagon deal is a cautionary tale for startups chasing federal contracts
item.description: The Pentagon has officially designated Anthropic a supply-chain risk after the two failed to agree on how much control the military should have over i...

item.title: Bill Gates’ TerraPower gets approval to build new nuclear reactor
item.description: It's the first permit to be issued by the Nuclear Regulatory Commission in nearly a decade.

item.title: Anthropic’s Claude found 22 vulnerabilities in Firefox over two weeks
item.description: In a recent security partnership with Mozilla, Anthropic found 22 separate vulnerabilities in Firefox — 14 of them classified as "high-severity."

item.title: OSHA probing fatality at Rivian warehouse
item.description: A 61-year-old worker died on Thursday after reportedly getting stuck between a tractor trailer and a loading dock.

item.title: Landlords: Here’s How You Can Improve Your Existing Systems With Industry-Leading Tools
item.description: This article is presented by RentRedi. Most DIY landlords are more organized than they give themselves credit for. You likely have a spreadsheet for r...

item.title: Mid-Term Rentals Are Gaining Serious Traction—Here’s What You Need to Know
item.description: Real estate trends usually announce themselves loudly. There’s a new buzzword, a viral tweet, a flood of “this is the next big thing” posts. Monthly r...
